rows.description: Dec: 28 to Francis King his Bill
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Dec: 28' and 'his Bill' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Dec. 26' and 'by Bill'. Fraction '½' is clearly visible.

rows.description: to ye Dean of St. Ch. Lent for being Vension
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct. Claude-haiku's description ('to 1/2 Dozen of 6d. paid for hay & hanging lanyon') and pence amount (6d instead of 0d) are completely inaccurate for this row based on visual verification.
Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Feb.' is correct, Claude-haiku misread as 'Fob.'.
Claude-haiku correctly read the '1' in the pounds column. Gemini-flash incorrectly read it as '0'. Date corrected to '13' from image (Claude-haiku had '15').
Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr. Munday his Bill' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Mrs Waundey by Bill'.

rows.description: 17 to Mr Weston four years Interest Due at xmas 1743
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this row's description with the subsequent row and misread the amounts (£12 8s 0d instead of £128 0s 0d).

rows.description: to Mr Weston upon bond by common consent —
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct row with amounts '32 00 00'. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged its description and amounts with the prior row and therefore missed this distinct entry.
Consensus between extractors for both description and amounts.

rows.description: to Mr. Blish one Rheam of Imp. Paper
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts (£2 12s 6d). Claude-haiku misread the description ('Mrs Ralph one shilion') and the pounds amount (0 instead of 2).
Gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts (£16 5s 2d). Claude-haiku misread the pounds amount (1 instead of 16) and description ('Teasler by Bill').
Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'ye Book for Candies' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'St. Book for badily'.
Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description '15 to Mr. Heritage' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's '16 to Mrs Heritage'.
Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr. Evens his Bill' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Mrs Beens by Bill'.

rows.description: May 19 to Mr Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot &c. P.k.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot &c. P.k.' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's '& 1/4 wine to entertain Mrs Widnot in P.t.'.

rows.description: June 12 to Mr Boyle's Works for ye Library
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr Boyle's Works for ye Library' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Mrs Bogle's works for y Library'.

rows.description: July 7 to Mr. Combes her Bill
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts (£2 4s 0d). Claude-haiku misread the pounds amount (0 instead of 2) and description ('Mrs Combes').

rows.description: 10 to Mr. Will. Talbot his Plate money
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr. Will. Talbot his Plate money' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Mr. Well Tallet by Plate money'.

rows.description: Aug 4 to Mr. Townsend his Bill
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct for description, date (Aug 4), and fraction (¾). Claude-haiku misread the date (Aug 1), 'by Bill' instead of 'his Bill', and the fraction (½ instead of ¾).

rows.description: 10 to Land tax for ye year 1742. & 1743. 4s. &c.
rows.notes: Gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts (£14 8s 0d). Claude-haiku misread the description ('Dr Dexter 2 of year 1742. 1743. 1/2 bid') and pounds amount (19 instead of 14).

rows.description: 20 brought to Act what was pd Newman for wine
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'brought to Act what was pd Newman for wine' is more accurate; Claude-haiku merged with the next row's description and had inaccuracies within its combined description.
Gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct entry with no monetary amounts. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged it with the previous row and therefore missed this distinct entry.
Consensus between extractors for both description and amounts.

rows.description: 28 to Salisbury Carrier for 2 Boxes from Mr Crabb
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description '28' and 'Mr Crabb' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's '25' and 'Mr Coade'.

rows.description: Oct. 10 to Mr Horner for Paper Ink &c.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Mr Horner' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'her Horner'.

rows.description: to Sedgley for binding two Buttory Books
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Sedgley' and 'Buttory Books' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'fiddles' and 'Battery Books'.
Gemini-flash is correct for description and amounts (£0 15s 0d). Claude-haiku misread the description ('&t. 5') and shillings amount (16s instead of 15s).

rows.description: 20 to Baylisse for carrying away Rubbish
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash description 'Baylisse' is more accurate to the image than Claude-haiku's 'Hay Wife'.
Gemini-flash is correct for all amounts (£386 12s 6d) and the fraction (¼). Claude-haiku misread pounds (356 instead of 386), pence (5 instead of 6), and fraction (¾ instead of ¼).
Consensus between extractors for amounts. Gemini-flash's note regarding the '9' in pounds being written over is accurate.
Gemini-flash is correct for amounts (£90 7s 5d) and the fraction (¼). Claude-haiku misread pence (4 instead of 5) and fraction (¾ instead of ¼).

Gemini-flash is correct. Claude-haiku violated the hard rule for shillings (25s) and misread the pence (8 instead of 5) and fraction (¾ instead of ¼). The image clearly shows '05' for shillings, '05' for pence, and '¼' for the fraction.
Gemini-flash is correct for the pounds amount (751) and description ('Total.'). Claude-haiku misread the pounds as 757 and description as 'Totall.'.

Extracted from Gemini-flash description. Amounts are embedded in the description text and extracted into the amount fields per supervisor protocol. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Dr blakly qua evrant') and misread the embedded amount's pounds (51 instead of 751) while incorrectly placing it in the amount columns.

Extracted from Gemini-flash description. Amounts are embedded in the description text and extracted per supervisor protocol. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Didacly recepit qua evant') and incorrectly extracted a much larger pounds amount (1739 instead of 739), noting its own uncertainty.

Extracted from Gemini-flash description. Amounts are embedded in the description text and extracted per supervisor protocol. Claude-haiku misread the description ('ne Delt. Dno Comput.') and the embedded amount's pounds (41 instead of 11) and pence (2 instead of 0).
Gemini-flash description is accurate ('Edcumbe'). Claude-haiku misread as 'December'. Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.
Gemini-flash description is accurate. Claude-haiku misread the name and title ('Jespish Webber Churcharden'). Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.
Gemini-flash description is accurate. Claude-haiku misread the name and abbreviation ('Jacobus Cogkpley & J/B.'). Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.
Gemini-flash description is accurate. Claude-haiku misread 'Car:' as 'Cav.' and 'A.M.' as 'H.M.'. Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.

Gemini-flash description is accurate. Claude-haiku completely hallucinated the description for this signatory ('shr. Shauly s. Sh.B.') for this row index. Both correctly identified as header with no amounts.
Gemini-flash correctly identified this row. Claude-haiku missed this row entirely.
